subcodes.first_line: O branch of the blessed Lote-Tree! Thy letter was noted and from it a sweet fragrance was inhaled. Today souls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فرع سدره مبارکه ورقه مکتوبه ملاحظه گردید نفحه خوشی استشمام شد الیوم نفوسی
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
